summary: This is a very brief announcement post where Joel Spolsky notes that his blog 'Joel on Software' has been translated into Dutch and Indonesian. There is no substantive argument or analysis — it is purely informational. The post consists of a single sentence with links to the translated versions.
key_points: Joel on Software was translated into Dutch and Indonesian, reflecting its growing international readership
money_quotes: Joel on Software in Dutch and Indonesian!
key_insight: This is a minor announcement post with no substantive content to analyze.
